meta.name: Region graph topology
meta.description: Each region's connectivity role (centrality scores) and the matrix of inter-region edges over the spatial graph.
meta.provenance: Adapted from the squidpy centrality/interaction-matrix vignettes; targets the visium_hne example.

readme: Builds a hexagonal-grid spatial graph, then computes per-region centrality scores and the normalized inter-region interaction matrix, grouped by `obs['cluster']`.

params.name: cluster_key
params.tooltip: obs column holding the region/cluster labels

params.name: coord_type
params.tooltip: spatial-graph geometry: grid for Visium hexagons, generic otherwise

params.name: n_neighs
params.tooltip: neighbors per node in the spatial graph (6 = Visium hexagonal grid)
